summary: BLOCK 72.1 Treasury Header Refactor - All features tested and working. Backend APIs (11 tests) pass 100%. Frontend UI verified via Playwright screenshots.
critical_code_review_comments: TreasuryHeader component correctly implements all design requirements
Count-up animation uses setInterval (not requestAnimationFrame) for reliability - confirmed working
Tab switching correctly triggers via onTabChange callback
Conditional rendering only shows Treasury when collectionValue.total_value > 0 (line 490)
No old flat Collection Value Banner found in code - properly removed
seed_data_creation: Existing demouser seed data used - 3 Igor records valued at $220.30 total
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 72.1 Treasury Header fully tested. Note: Collection value shown is $220 (not $156 from original spec - values were refreshed from Discogs). All features verified: gold gradient border (DAA520), frosted glass blur(16px), honeycomb icon, cloud icon, serif font currency values, tab switching, refresh button, count-up animation. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_treasury_header.py.

backend: GET /api/valuation/collection - returns total_value, valued_count, total_count (200 OK)
GET /api/valuation/dreamlist - returns $0 for user with no dream items (200 OK)
Auth required on all valuation endpoints (401 without token)
frontend: Treasury Header renders when collection has valued records
Collection Value displays correct dollar amount ($220)
Dream Records displays $0 for user with no dream items
Clicking Collection Value button activates owned tab
Clicking Dream Records button activates wishlist tab
Refresh button triggers value refresh without errors
Treasury header has Brushed Gold border (gradient with DAA520)
Treasury header has frosted amber glass background with backdrop-filter blur(16px)
Honeycomb icon visible next to Collection Value
Cloud icon visible next to Dream Records
Old flat Collection Value Banner is removed (no duplicate)
'vs' divider visible between collection and dream values
